title: 20th Anniversary Eva Expo in China in October
display_title: 20th Anniversary Eva Expo in China in October
wikitext:
[]: 20th Anniversary Eva Expo in China in October             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Sep 14, 2015 7:58 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4050.html This seems pretty cool! It looks like they're holding (another?) Eva Expo in Beijing starting on October 1st. Now if they'd only give us Chinese dress Mari and Asuka figures to go with that Rei!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Sep 14, 2015 10:06 am The girls in qipao came out last year, the guys are new for this year. Admission at 70 RMB, ~$11. Goods and venue pics: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3693.html Rei seems to be a hit with the Chinese. What is Kaworu doing with his right hand?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 14, 2015 10:36 am Rei is first in the series for that Chinese dress set, if I remember the Eva Fan tweet for EGF correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Sep 14, 2015 1:22 pm AR-99 wrote: What is Kaworu doing with his right hand?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Sep 14, 2015 9:09 pm Good eye, as this larger image clarifies: http://ww1.sinaimg.cn/large/61b1dc3djw1emxqd2qjz1j218g0xcn7k.jpg
